# SarvamSai — A Centenary Offering

> A devotional collectible Discovery Box honouring the 100th birth anniversary of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba (1926–2026).

## What is SarvamSai?

SarvamSai is a limited edition collectible offering created by AuRaaZ Technologies. It comprises a sealed Discovery Box containing a hand-finished, 3D-printed PLA figurine of one of four Swaroopas of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba. The offering is made as an act of devotion.

## The Offering

- 100 Discovery Boxes released daily for 100 days
- Blessing window: 24 April 2026 to 1 August 2026
- The opening date, 24 April 2026, is Aaradhana Day — the day Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba left His physical form on April 24, 2011 — observed by devotees as Aaradhana Day, a day of worship and remembrance. Fifteen years to the day, He returns in the hands of devotees through the figurine.
- Total edition: 10,000 boxes
- Each box is time-stamped with its blessing date and numbered
- The Swaroopa inside is not revealed until the devotee opens the box

## The Four Swaroopas

Each box contains one of four figurine variants, distributed in a sacred ratio of 4:3:2:1 per 10 boxes:

1. **Satya Swaroopa** (Saffron Robe) — Embodiment of Truth. 4 in every 10. Most Abundant.
2. **Dharma Swaroopa** (Golden Robe) — Embodiment of Righteousness. 3 in every 10. Abundant.
3. **Shanti Swaroopa** (White Robe) — Embodiment of Peace. 2 in every 10. Rare.
4. **Prema Swaroopa** (Crimson Robe) — Embodiment of Love. 1 in every 10. Rarest.

You do not choose your Swaroopa. You receive the one that was always meant for you.

## How to Get Your Figurine — The Complete Process

### Step 1 — Express Your Devotion (Register)
- Visit https://sarvamsai.in and go to the Darshan Queue section
- Enter your name and email address
- A confirmation email arrives within minutes
- Your rank in the queue is assigned immediately
- Registration is free.

### Step 2 — Invite a Devotee (Optional)
- After registering you receive a personal invitation link: sarvamsai.in/?ref=your-email
- Every devotee who registers through your link moves you closer to your blessing day
- This is optional

### Step 3 — Nominate Your Samithi (Optional)
- A modal appears after registration inviting you to nominate your Samithi, Satsang or devotional group
- This is optional and can be skipped

### Step 4 — Receive Your Blessing Invitation
- The offering opens on 24 April 2026 and runs for 100 days
- Each day, exactly 100 Discovery Boxes are released
- When your blessing day arrives, you receive a personal email invitation
- Missing your invitation does not mean losing grace. There is a grace buffer and you are moved to the next available blessing day.

### Step 5 — Complete Your Offering
- Follow the link in your invitation email to complete your offering
- You may receive more than one Discovery Box, but each is a separate offering

### Step 6 — Your Discovery Box Ships
- Your sealed Discovery Box ships within 5 days of confirmation, worldwide, in secure gift-ready packaging
- Inside: one numbered collectible figurine, a sealed gift box, and a certificate of authenticity
- The Swaroopa within is not known in advance, not even to the team

### Step 7 — The Reveal
- The Swaroopa is revealed when you open the box
- You do not choose your Swaroopa. It finds you.

### Common Questions

**How do I get a SarvamSai figurine?**
Register free at sarvamsai.in. Join the queue, get invited when your blessing day comes, then complete your offering and your Discovery Box ships within 5 days.

**Can I choose which Swaroopa I get?**
No. You receive the one that was always meant for you. The Swaroopa is sealed until you open the box.

**What if I miss my invitation email?**
You are not lost. There is a grace buffer and you are moved to the next available blessing day.

**How many boxes are available?**
10,000 total. 100 released each day for 100 days (24 April to 1 August 2026).

**Is this only for Sai Baba devotees?**
All are welcome who feel drawn to the values of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love. His grace has never asked for a credential.

**What is inside the Discovery Box?**
A numbered, hand-finished 3D-printed PLA figurine of one of four Swaroopas of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba, a sealed gift box, and a certificate of authenticity.

## About Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Born November 23, 1926 in Puttaparthi, Andhra Pradesh, India. Spiritual leader and humanitarian who taught five Human Values: Satya (Truth), Dharma (Righteousness), Shanti (Peace), Prema (Love), Ahimsa (Non-violence). He is Ananta, without beginning, without end. November 23, 2026 marks 100 years since His birth.

## The Story Behind the Offering

Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba performed Kamayya Gupta Vinnakota's Aksharabhyasam, the sacred initiation into learning. SarvamSai is a convergence of everything Baba made possible in him, returned to Him and through Him to every devotee who holds the figurine. It is not a product. It is an offering.

## The Team

- **Kamayya Gupta Vinnakota** — Creative Technologist, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies. 25+ years in CG, digital creation and technology.
- **Satyadev Vasigala** — Content & Concepts, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies.
- **Anish Mohan** — CG Supervisor & Artisan. Creator of the SarvamSai figurines.
